details.test: Task 1: Compare two early cherry tomato varieties for salads with high ratings
Task 2: Create favorites list of compact/container tomato varieties
Task 3: Select paste tomato for canning with fusarium resistance and add to garden plan
Task 4: Use planting calendar to schedule spring cherry tomato planting for ZIP 98101
Task 5: Compare disease resistance of heirloom tomato varieties
Task 6: Tomato Finder Quiz and favorite the first recommended variety
Task 7: Find red salad tomato and add to garden plan
Task 8: Submit a written review for Roma variety
Task 9: Create succession planting plan with two dates for Roma
